mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.project_id AS "projectId", a.stage_id AS "stageId", a.inspection_items AS "inspectionItems", a.inspection_items AS "items", a.plan_inspection_time AS "planInspectionTime", a.plan_inspection_time AS "inspectionTime", a.site_photos AS "sitePhotos", a.site_photos AS "photos", a.participants, a.signatures, a.passed_at AS "passedAt", a.acceptance_comments AS "acceptanceComments", a.acceptance_comments AS "comments", a.remark, a.inspector_id AS "inspectorId", inspector.name AS "inspectorName", a.result, a.status, CASE WHEN a.status = 3 THEN 'completed' WHEN a.status = 4 THEN 'rectifying' WHEN a.status = 5 THEN 'recheckPending' WHEN a.status = 2 THEN 'processing' ELSE 'pending' END AS "statusCode", CASE WHEN a.status = 3 THEN '已完成' WHEN a.status = 4 THEN '整改中' WHEN a.status = 5 THEN '待复验' WHEN a.status = 2 THEN '验收中' ELSE '待验收' END AS "statusText", a.created_by AS "createdBy", a.created_at AS "createdAt", a.updated_by AS "updatedBy", a.updated_at AS "updatedAt", p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", s.stage_name AS "stageName", s.stage_name AS "node", u.name AS "createdByName" FROM inspection a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN project_stage s ON s.id = a.stage_id LEFT JOIN sys_account u ON u.id = a.created_by LEFT JOIN sys_account inspector ON inspector.id = a.inspector_id WHERE a.id = #{id}
